title: noccaea suffruticosa
intro: Noccaea suffruticosa, also known as creeping pennywort or rock pennywort, is a low-growing, perennial herb in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Noccaea suffruticosa include potential anti-cancer properties, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced inflammation. It is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or tablet form to harness its medicinal properties.
